notes: Data axis: added optional MusicXML track metadata to Song and a compact form-first song definition that expands to 86 chord measures across ten sections.
Rendering axis: the existing alphaTab client component loads all three MusicXML tracks for the new song while preserving the AlphaTex path and chord-chart-only rest suppression for legacy songs.
Visual axis: exposed the existing analysisDigest field as a compact Geist Mono form map; no global styles, theme variables, component libraries, or page layout were added.
Asset axis: copied the validated MusicXML and MIDI into public/scores; removed redundant embedded score title and per-measure metronome marks from the web-display MusicXML.
Browser-before evidence was captured before implementation, and initial desktop/mobile after evidence shows no horizontal overflow or error overlay.
